'''Volytar''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[High Inquisitor]] who was [[Battle of Skorrupon|intercepted]] outside of his personal [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] by [[Arani Korden]], [[Rorworr (Naboo)|Rorworr]], and [[Deel Surool]] at the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Skorrupon/Legends|Skorrupon]].

The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Sia-Lan Wezz]] was reported as killed in the aftermath of the battle.
